Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits for this patient’s age and sex. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, lipid profile, and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are unremarkable. No evidence of acute or chronic metabolic, renal, or cardiovascular disturbances from the laboratory perspective. No further laboratory action required at this time.
